/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/liblithe.a  CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/log/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/log/logAppender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/log/logFormatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/log/logStream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/thread/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/common/fileUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/common/processInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lithe.dir/common/timestamp.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/liblithe.a
